content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against `master` excluding `.ralph-burning/`, then read the key implementation paths end-to-end (`src/shared/domain.rs`, `src/contexts/workspace_governance/config.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/{model,journal,service}.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/{mod,engine}.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, and the related adapter changes). I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues that warrant an amendment. I also spot-checked the new coverage by running `cargo test iterative_minimal -- --nocapture` and `cargo test --features test-stub --test unit iterative_minimal -- --nocapture`; the targeted iterative_minimal test suites passed.

## Amendments

None.
